item.title: AMD
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: AMD and Cerebras Systems announced a technical partnership to deliver a new disaggregated AI inference solution combining AMD Helios rackscale solutions with the Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine.

evidence.source_quote: AMD (NASDAQ: AMD) and Cerebras Systems (NASDAQ: CBRS) announced a technical partnership to deliver a new disaggregated AI inference solution that combines AMD Helios™ rackscale solutions with the Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine.

updates.event: The joint AMD and Cerebras disaggregated AI inference solution was unveiled at the Advancing AI 2026 conference.

evidence.source_quote: Unveiled at Advancing AI 2026, the solution is designed to deliver the ultra-low latency required for the most advanced AI applications while dramatically increasing the throughput and efficiency.

updates.event: AMD positions Helios as the foundation for high-throughput and balanced inference workloads across the data center, with the joint solution targeting the ultra-low-latency segment of the inference market.
updates.after_state: "foundation for high-throughput and balanced inference workloads across the data center"

evidence.source_quote: a solution designed specifically for the ultra-low-latency segment of the inference market, with AMD Helios as the foundation for high-throughput and balanced inference workloads across the data center.

facts.statement: AMD and Cerebras Systems announced a technical partnership to deliver a new disaggregated AI inference solution combining AMD Helios rackscale solutions with the Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine.
The joint AMD and Cerebras disaggregated AI inference solution was unveiled at the Advancing AI 2026 conference.

AMD positions Helios as the foundation for high-throughput and balanced inference workloads across the data center, with the joint solution targeting the ultra-low-latency segment of the inference market.
facts.value: foundation for high-throughput and balanced inference workloads across the data center

item.html:
